title: Simulation of a continuous assignment of an unpacked array throws error

features.name: unpacked array port with descending range
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array port declaration using a descending range (high:low) instead of the typical ascending range

features.name: continuous assignment to unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment statement targeting an unpacked array signal

features.name: unpacked array literal with high-impedance value
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array literal containing a high-impedance ('bz) value mixed with other values
